publicationNotes: Verified stories will be published only after patient consent, moderation, and medical accuracy review are complete.
The submission workflow must support moderation, consent management, multilingual publishing, and media handling before public launch.
Analytics and engagement reporting should be added only after the live patient story workflow is operational.

legalNotices.medicalDisclaimer: All patient stories are shared with consent and are for informational purposes only. Individual results may vary. Always consult with healthcare professionals for personalized medical advice.
legalNotices.privacyNotice: Patient privacy is protected through anonymization where requested. No personal health information is shared without explicit consent.
legalNotices.moderationPolicy: All stories undergo medical accuracy review before publication. COLONAiVE reserves the right to edit for clarity while maintaining authenticity.
